Abilities.name: Communication

Abilities.description: Fully concentrating, understanding, and responding thoughtfully to what others are saying.

Abilities.description: Recognizing, understanding, and managing one’s own emotions and those of others.

Abilities.name: Teamwork
Abilities.description: Collaborating effectively with others to achieve shared goals.

Abilities.name: Conflict Resolution
Abilities.description: Managing and resolving disagreements in a constructive and respectful manner.

Abilities.name: Adaptability
Abilities.description: Adjusting effectively to new conditions, challenges, and changes in the environment.

Abilities.name: Problem Solving
Abilities.description: Identifying issues, analyzing options, and implementing effective solutions.

Abilities.name: Critical Thinking
Abilities.description: Analyzing information objectively to make reasoned judgments and decisions.

Abilities.name: Time Management
Abilities.description: Organizing and prioritizing tasks to use time efficiently and meet deadlines.

Abilities.name: Leadership
Abilities.description: Guiding, motivating, and influencing others toward achieving objectives.

Abilities.name: Decision Making
Abilities.description: Evaluating information and choosing the most appropriate course of action.

Abilities.name: Stress Management
Abilities.description: Maintaining performance and emotional balance under pressure.

Abilities.name: Empathy
Abilities.description: Understanding and sharing the feelings and perspectives of others.

Abilities.name: Accountability
Abilities.description: Taking responsibility for actions, decisions, and outcomes.

Abilities.name: Work Ethic

Abilities.name: Creativity
Abilities.description: Generating innovative ideas and approaching problems with originality.

Abilities.name: Resilience

Abilities.name: Negotiation

Abilities.name: Self-Motivation
